problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
